introSection: Mighty Mouse is a travelling steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster owned by US carnival operator Wade Shows, Inc..

sections.title: History
sections.content: The coaster was previously located at Mt. Olympus Water & Theme Park where it operated under the name Opa until March 6, 2014, when a man fell from the ride.

sections.title: Incident
sections.content:
On March 6, 2014 a 64-year-old man fell nearly from the ride and was airlifted to hospital with brain injuries and multiple bone fractures. The amusement park reopened the following day but Opa remained closed.

In early April, it was announced that Opa would be removed from the park after an investigation found the ride to have four code violations. The ride was purchased by Wade Shows, Inc. and debuted in June 2014 after a new lighting package was installed.

fullText:
Mighty Mouse is a travelling steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster owned by US carnival operator Wade Shows, Inc..

The coaster was previously located at Mt. Olympus Water & Theme Park where it operated under the name Opa until March 6, 2014, when a man fell from the ride.

On March 6, 2014 a 64-year-old man fell nearly from the ride and was airlifted to hospital with brain injuries and multiple bone fractures. The amusement park reopened the following day but Opa remained closed.

In early April, it was announced that Opa would be removed from the park after an investigation found the ride to have four code violations. The ride was purchased by Wade Shows, Inc. and debuted in June 2014 after a new lighting package was installed.
